description: Ansible run history + Wing event timeline + migration / upgrade queues. Queries Wing's SQLite events table directly via frser-sqlite-datasource (bind-mounted read-only from ~/wing/app/data/wing.db).

options.content: Every `main.yml` run emits structured lifecycle events via `callback_plugins/wing_telemetry.py` (gated on `NOS_TELEMETRY_ENABLED=1` or `wing_telemetry_enabled: true`). The plugin POSTs HMAC-signed batches to Bone (`http://api.dev.local/api/v1/events`); Bone writes them into **Wing SQLite** (`~/wing/app/data/wing.db` → `events` table). This dashboard reads that table directly via the `frser-sqlite-datasource` plugin (read-only volume mount). If the HTTP POST fails, the plugin spools to `/tmp/nos-events-fallback.db` and the operator can replay manually.

panels.title: Last run recap
panels.description: Latest playbook run summary. Reads from events.recap via JSON extract on the most recent playbook_end event.

options.content:
_For the full recap, open Wing `/timeline` — it renders the same events table with per-run drill-down._

The panels below show:
- **counts** (runs, failed runs) over 7d / 30d
- **avg duration** from `events.duration_ms` (playbook_end events)
- **active coexistence tracks** from `coexistence_tracks`
- **last 50 events** across every run_id

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS runs FROM events WHERE type = 'playbook_end' AND ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS runs FROM events WHERE type = 'playbook_end' AND ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days')

panels.title: Failed runs 7d
panels.description: Count of distinct run_ids where at least one task_failed or task_unreachable event was recorded within the retention window.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS failed FROM events WHERE type IN ('task_failed', 'task_unreachable') AND ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS failed FROM events WHERE type IN ('task_failed', 'task_unreachable') AND ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days')

panels.title: Avg duration 7d
panels.description: Average wallclock playbook duration (ms → s) across playbook_end events in the last 7 days.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT AVG(duration_ms) / 1000.0 AS avg_seconds FROM events WHERE type = 'playbook_end' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
targets.queryText: SELECT AVG(duration_ms) / 1000.0 AS avg_seconds FROM events WHERE type = 'playbook_end' AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND ts >= datetime('now', '-7 days')

panels.title: Migrations applied (total)
panels.description: Total rows in migrations_applied. New rows are inserted on every successful nos_migrate apply.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS migrations FROM migrations_applied
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS migrations FROM migrations_applied

panels.title: Upgrades applied (total)
panels.description: Total rows in upgrades_applied. Includes rollbacks (rolled_back=1).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS upgrades FROM upgrades_applied
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS upgrades FROM upgrades_applied

panels.title: Active coexistence tracks
panels.description: Rows in coexistence_tracks with active=1 (a live dual-version track for the given service).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS tracks FROM coexistence_tracks WHERE active = 1
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS tracks FROM coexistence_tracks WHERE active = 1

panels.title: Run history — last 30 days (ok vs failed)
panels.description: Per-day count of distinct run_ids that reached playbook_end, split by whether any task failed or went unreachable during the run.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%s', date(e.ts)) * 1 AS time, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM events f WHERE f.run_id = e.run_id AND f.type IN ('task_failed','task_unreachable')) THEN 'failed' ELSE 'ok' END AS status, COUNT(DISTINCT e.run_id) AS runs FROM events e WHERE e.type = 'playbook_end' AND e.ts >= datetime('now','-30 days') GROUP BY date(e.ts), status ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%s', date(e.ts)) * 1 AS time, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM events f WHERE f.run_id = e.run_id AND f.type IN ('task_failed','task_unreachable')) THEN 'failed' ELSE 'ok' END AS status, COUNT(DISTINCT e.run_id) AS runs FROM events e WHERE e.type = 'playbook_end' AND e.ts >= datetime('now','-30 days') GROUP BY date(e.ts), status ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Event timeline (last 50)
panels.description: Latest 50 events across all run_ids, newest first.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ts, type, run_id, playbook, role, task, host, duration_ms, changed, migration_id, upgrade_id, patch_id FROM events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT ts, type, run_id, playbook, role, task, host, duration_ms, changed, migration_id, upgrade_id, patch_id FROM events ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Recent migrations
panels.description: Last 20 rows from migrations_applied — one row per nos_migrate apply (and, if rolled back, one row per rollback).

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT id, title, severity, applied_at, success, duration_sec, steps_applied, steps_total, rolled_back_from FROM migrations_applied ORDER BY applied_at DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT id, title, severity, applied_at, success, duration_sec, steps_applied, steps_total, rolled_back_from FROM migrations_applied ORDER BY applied_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent upgrades
panels.description: Last 20 rows from upgrades_applied — one row per service upgrade apply / rollback.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT service, recipe_id, from_version, to_version, severity, applied_at, success, duration_sec, rolled_back FROM upgrades_applied ORDER BY applied_at DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT service, recipe_id, from_version, to_version, severity, applied_at, success, duration_sec, rolled_back FROM upgrades_applied ORDER BY applied_at DESC LIMIT 20

title: nOS — Playbook & Wing Timeline
